raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "offering a paradoxical instruction on non-striving to reveal effortless being",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "effort disrupts natural alignment with rest or presence",
    "quiet lying is the spontaneous outcome of relinquishing intention",
    "true rest arises only when the separate will is absent"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent within a non-dual frame that treats effort and outcome as mutually exclusive",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the listener accepts non-effort as a valid spiritual method and is not confusing it with literal physical paralysis",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the statement is taken as practical medical advice or applied where physiological sleep disorders require intervention"
}
